title: Vanilla Extensive Recipes+
description: Adds, extensive recipes, but those recipes are very cool and very handy.
body:
## **Made By [TeamJEM](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCd8Z_hfel3R6dcA1Lz6geLQ)**
### 
### **Feel free to modify it however you like, if published please give credit!**

**Added Recipes Include:**
Notch Apple [​Enchanted Golden Apple],
Trident,
All Horse Armors [​Leather One Changed To Fit],
Netherite Smithing Template [​Adds a recipe to make it initially.],
Saddle,
Chainmail Armor,
Chain,
Name Tag

ALL RECIPES [Given On Join of Game]:

Trident [⬛=IronIngot,🟦=PrismarineShard,🟩=IronNugget]
- ⬜⬛🟩
- ⬜🟦⬛
- 🟦⬜⬜

Horse Armor [⬛=HorseArmorMaterial]
- ⬜⬜⬛
- ⬛⬛⬛
- ⬛⬜⬛

Netherite Smithing Template [💎=Diamond,⬛=NetheriteIngot,🟥=Netherack]
- 💎💎💎
- 💎⬛💎
- 💎🟥💎

Saddle [🟫=Leather,🟩=IronNugget,🟥=TripwireHook]
- ⬜⬜⬜
- 🟫🟫🟫
- 🟩🟥🟩

Chainmail Helmet [🟩=IronNugget,⬛=Chain]
- 🟩⬛🟩
- ⬛⬜⬛
- ⬜⬜⬜

Chainmail Chestplate [🟩=IronNugget,⬛=Chain]
- 🟩⬜🟩
- ⬛⬛⬛
- ⬛⬛⬛

Chainmail Leggings [🟩=IronNugget,⬛=Chain]
- ⬛⬛⬛
- ⬛⬜⬛
- 🟩⬜🟩

Chainmail Boots [🟩=IronNugget,⬛=Chain]
- ⬜⬜⬜
- ⬛⬜⬛
- 🟩⬜🟩

Chain [🟩=IronNugget]
- ⬜🟩⬜
- 🟩⬜🟩
- ⬜🟩⬜

Name Tag [🏷️=NameTag,📄=Paper] (GIVES 2x)
- ⬜📄⬜
- 📄🏷️📄
- ⬜📄⬜
